title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — From Loop to RSI: Sovereign Invention Governance Lab v32
tagline: The proof loop becomes an invention-governance institution.
coreMessage: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work. RSI governs the invention loop.
standard: No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement. No ungoverned self-improvement.
claimBoundary: No claim that AGI, ASI, or recursive self-improvement has been achieved.
No wallet, escrow, payment, token transaction, user upload, user account, analytics, cookie, or personal data collection.
The RSI console uses predefined synthetic scenarios and does not call an external AI service.

stages.label: Target
stages.purpose: Allocate exploration pressure across archive cells, bridge regions, and themes.

stages.label: Emit
stages.purpose: Generate candidate cards under explicit constraints and targeting.

stages.label: Filter
stages.purpose: Apply risk gates and interestingness routing without admission authority.

stages.label: Atlas
stages.purpose: Extract mechanisms, causal triples, and neighborhood context for comparatives.

stages.label: Test-plan
stages.purpose: Build falsification ladders and schedule cheapest useful probes.

stages.label: Eval
stages.purpose: Evaluate against incumbent, neighbor, and null baselines; mint evidence objects.

stages.label: Insert
stages.purpose: Update append-only archive mechanically; record breakthrough events.

stages.label: Promote
stages.purpose: Rank promotions by mechanical scoring and emit queue artifacts.

gates.name: Risk gate
gates.rule: Prohibited-domain and unsafe-deployment signals can stop or downgrade outcomes.

gates.name: Evidence gate
gates.rule: Confidence cannot inflate without evidence execution; simulated evidence stays capped.

gates.name: Baseline gate
gates.rule: Every serious advantage claim is comparative against incumbent, neighbor, or null baseline.

gates.name: Persistence gate
gates.rule: High novelty receives more skepticism and stress testing before promotion.

gates.name: Human authority gate
gates.rule: Validator/Architect Council can stop, bound, or request a dossier before release.

scenarios.title: From loop to recursive invention governance
Search control is not outcome authority

sourceDocuments.title: AGI Alpha RSI — Sovereign Invention Governance
